# MoltSets

## About MoltSets

MoltSets provides a people data API and MCP for identity resolution, contact enrichment, and B2B prospecting.

- App: https://app.moltsets.com - MoltSets: 100% verified business and personal emails, mobile phones, and Sha256's for ads. Get started for free.
- Support docs: https://support.moltsets.com - MoltSets Help Desk articles with information on how to use the MoltSets app, manage billing, manage accounts, and more.
- Developer docs: https://developer.moltsets.com - MoltSets Developer Documentation that includes API reference as well as information on connecting AI agents to the MoltSets MCP.
- Skills library: https://library.moltsets.com - Claude Skills for MoltSets — pre-built, ready to run. Start with identity resolution, enrichment, and more.

## Key pages

- [Overview](https://developer.moltsets.com/getting-started/overview): What MoltSets is, base URL, request/response structure, plans, and available tools.
- [Authentication](https://developer.moltsets.com/getting-started/authentication): API key format (`ms_XXXXXXXXXXX`), how to create/revoke keys, Bearer token usage, error responses.
- [Rate Limits](https://developer.moltsets.com/getting-started/rate-limits): Per-plan limits, what counts as a request, 429 handling, exponential backoff, multi-key strategies.
- [MoltSets App](https://developer.moltsets.com/getting-started/moltsets-app): Logging in, navigating the app.
- [I Have X, I Want Y](https://developer.moltsets.com/i-have-x-i-want-y): Tool selection guide — pick based on what data you have (email, HEM, LinkedIn, IP) and what you need. Covers email/people finding, identity resolution, company lookup, IP resolution, search, and chained workflows.
- [Find Companies and Contacts](https://developer.moltsets.com/find-companies-and-contacts): Search guide — build prospect lists, look up companies by domain, and find contacts matching an ICP via the MCP or API. Covers filters, pagination, and code examples.

## Integrations
- [MoltSets MCP Server](https://developer.moltsets.com/moltsets-mcp): MCP server URL (`https://mcp.moltsets.com/mcp`), setup for Claude.ai, Claude Desktop, and Claude Code, example prompts, troubleshooting.
- [Clay HTTP API](https://developer.moltsets.com/clay) - Use MoltSets tools directly in Clay via the HTTP API enrichment.

## API reference

Base URL: `https://api.moltsets.com/api/v1/tools/`

Authentication: `Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY` on every request.

All requests are `POST` with a JSON body. All responses return HTTP 200 with envelope: `{ "results": {...}, "status": "ok", "metadata": { "tokens_charged": N, "tokens_remaining": N } }`.

### Account

- [GET /get_account](https://developer.moltsets.com/api-reference/account/get-account): Retrieve account details and credit balance.
- [GET /get_billing](https://developer.moltsets.com/api-reference/account/get-billing): Retrieve billing plan, renewal date, and per-tool credit costs.
- [GET /get_usage](https://developer.moltsets.com/api-reference/account/get-usage): Retrieve credit usage breakdown.

### Get Email

- [POST /enrich_email](https://developer.moltsets.com/api-reference/get-email/enrich-email): LinkedIn URL → best available email (business preferred, falls back to personal). Returns `type` field (`"business"` or `"personal"`).
- [POST /enrich_business_email](https://developer.moltsets.com/api-reference/get-email/enrich-business-email): LinkedIn URL → business email address only.
- [POST /enrich_personal_email](https://developer.moltsets.com/api-reference/get-email/linkedin-to-personal-email): LinkedIn URL → personal email address.
- [POST /linkedin_to_best_personal_email](https://developer.moltsets.com/api-reference/get-email/linkedin-to-best-personal-email): LinkedIn URL → best-match personal email.
- [POST /hem_to_email](https://developer.moltsets.com/api-reference/get-email/hem-to-email): HEM (MD5) → plaintext email + SHA-256.
- [POST /business_email_to_personal_hem](https://developer.moltsets.com/api-reference/get-email/business-email-to-personal-hem): Business email or HEM → personal HEM.

### Get LinkedIn

- [POST /hem_to_linkedin](https://developer.moltsets.com/api-reference/get-linked-in/hem-to-linkedin): Email or HEM → LinkedIn slug.
- [POST /hem_to_best_linkedin](https://developer.moltsets.com/api-reference/get-linked-in/hem-to-best-linkedin): Email or HEM → best-match LinkedIn profile URL.

### Get HEM or MAID

- [POST /linkedin_to_hashed_emails](https://developer.moltsets.com/api-reference/get-hem-or-maid/linkedin-to-hashed-emails): LinkedIn URL → all known HEMs.
- [POST /hem_to_maid](https://developer.moltsets.com/api-reference/get-hem-or-maid/hem-to-maid): Email or HEM → mobile advertising ID (MAID).
- [POST /ip_to_hem](https://developer.moltsets.com/api-reference/get-hem-or-maid/ip-to-hem): IP address → HEMs ranked by confidence.
- [POST /ip_to_maid](https://developer.moltsets.com/api-reference/get-hem-or-maid/ip-to-maid): IP address → MAIDs.
- [POST /business_email_to_personal_hem](https://developer.moltsets.com/api-reference/get-email/business-email-to-personal-hem): Business email or HEM → personal HEM.

### Get Business Profile

- [POST /linkedin_to_business_profile](https://developer.moltsets.com/api-reference/get-business-profile/linkedin-to-business-profile): LinkedIn URL → business profile + company data.
- [POST /hem_to_business_profile](https://developer.moltsets.com/api-reference/get-business-profile/hem-to-business-profile): Email or HEM → business profile + company data.

### Get Phone

- [POST /enrich_phone](https://developer.moltsets.com/api-reference/get-mobile-phone/enrich-phone): LinkedIn URL → mobile phone number. Supports up to 100 `linkedin_urls` per call.

### Get Company

- [POST /ip_to_company](https://developer.moltsets.com/api-reference/get-company/ip-to-company): IP address → company associated with that IP.

### Search

- [POST /search_company_profiles](https://developer.moltsets.com/api-reference/search/search-company-profiles): Search companies by name, domain, industry, size, or revenue → ranked company profiles.
- [POST /search_business_profiles](https://developer.moltsets.com/api-reference/search/search-business-profiles): Search people by company, industry, size, or revenue → ranked business profiles.

## Plans

| Plan | Tokens | Rate Limit |
|------|--------|------------|
| $0 | 1000 | 1000 requests/min |
| \$27 / month | Unlimited |  30 requests/min |
| \$97 / month | Unlimited | 1000 requests/min |
| \$497 / month | Unlimited | 5000 requests/min |

> [Getting the \$997/month plan for \$497/month with the UGC Discount — How It Works](https://support.moltsets.com/en/articles/15207288).

## MCP Server

MCP Server URL: `https://mcp.moltsets.com/mcp`

Connect via Claude Code:
```bash
claude mcp add --transport http moltsets https://mcp.moltsets.com/mcp \
  --client-id YOUR_CLIENT_ID \
  --client-secret YOUR_CLIENT_SECRET
```

Credentials (Client ID + Client Secret) are created at https://app.moltsets.com/dashboard/api_keys.
